nodes.name: Skema Aplikasi SPJ
nodes.description: Schema file defining the SPJ application's core features: data entry (NPSN, nama sekolah, pejabat), file uploads (profil sekolah, data guru), bukti fisik categories (9+ types: honor, perjalanan dinas, mamin, penggandaan, cetak foto, cetak banner, sewa, pemeliharaan, tagihan), workshop (internal/external), dokumen wajib (SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH), realisasi dana BOSP, and PR pengadaan.

nodes.name: Plan Frontend Blueprint
nodes.description: Frontend blueprint for SPJ app using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS. Defines 9 routes, 8 sidebar menu items, page layouts, component hierarchy, template cards (26 types across 3 groups), UI state patterns (empty, loading, error, confirmation, toast), state management (React Context/Zustand), and PDF generation approach.

nodes.name: Perbandingan Teknologi SPJ
nodes.description: Technology comparison document analyzing options for SPJ app: Supabase Free→Pro, VPS+PostgreSQL, SQLite, Google Apps Script, Electron, File-Based JSON. Recommends Supabase Free Tier for blueprint (Rp0), upgrade path to production. Target 600 users.

nodes.name: Panduan Arsitektur Deploy Laravel SPJ
nodes.description: Architecture deployment guide for SPJ app using Laravel + SQLite, modeled after eRapor (local installation). Covers installer flow, database setup, Dapodik integration, deployment strategies, and installation for non-IT staff.

nodes.name: Riset Arsitektur Dapodik eRapor Framework
nodes.description: Research document on Dapodik and eRapor architecture patterns, framework comparison, and integration approaches for school financial applications.

nodes.name: Login Authentication
nodes.description: Admin-only login with animated split layout (left: illustration, right: form). Form validation, loading state, error messages, smooth transition animations.

nodes.name: Pendataan Sekolah
nodes.description: Data entry for school profile (NPSN, nama, kecamatan, kabupaten, alamat, email) and school officials (KS, Bendahara, Pengawas, Sekdik with NIP). Supports both manual form and Excel upload.

nodes.name: Upload Data
nodes.description: Upload data profil sekolah and data guru & tendik via Excel (.xlsx) files. Drag & drop or browse file upload interface.

nodes.name: BKU Transaction Table
nodes.description: Excel-like BKU (Buku Kas Umum) transaction table with columns: No, Tanggal, Uraian, Kode Rekening, Debet, Kredit, Saldo, Bukti, Aksi (print icon). Features: sort by column, filter by period (Bulan/Tahun/Semester), auto-calculate Saldo, print icon navigates to /bku/cetak/:id.

nodes.name: Cetak Dokumen SPJ
nodes.description: Main document composition and printing page per BKU transaction. Split view: Card Grid (document type switching) | Document Editor (form input) | Document Preview (real-time multi-page). Footer actions: Cetak Dokumen, Export PDF, Cetak Semua, Export Semua.

nodes.name: Dokumen Wajib (Luar ARKAS)
nodes.description: Mandatory documents outside ARKAS. Toggle SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH controls which documents appear. SIPLAH: only Dok. PBJ. Non-SIPLAH: Dok. PBJ + Register KAS + Berita Acara Pemeriksaan KAS + Lembar Kritik/Saran + Lembar Pengaduan + Papan BOS.

nodes.name: Realisasi Dana BOSP
nodes.description: Realization of BOSP funds with 3 tabs: Cover (tahun anggaran, nama sekolah, dana BOSP, sumber dana), Sekat (kode rekening, uraian, anggaran, realisasi, selisih), Alur (fund usage flow). Auto-calculate selisih, export per tab to PDF.

nodes.name: Pengaturan Aplikasi
nodes.description: Application settings with 4 tabs: Profil Sekolah (8 fields), Data Master (4 setting items), Backup & Restore (export/import/reset with confirmation dialog), Tentang (app info table).

nodes.name: / (Landing Page)
nodes.description: Opening page with school branding. Hero section 'Sampurasun! Selamat Datang', features section with 3-4 cards, info section, footer.

nodes.name: /login (Login)
nodes.description: Admin-only login page with split layout: left = animated illustration, right = login form.

nodes.name: /dashboard (Dashboard)
nodes.description: Main dashboard with stats cards (Total BKU, Total Dokumen), recent BKU table (5 rows), document progress bars.

nodes.name: /data-sekolah (Data Sekolah)
nodes.description: School data input page with Form/Upload tabs. Form fields: NPSN, nama sekolah, kecamatan, kabupaten, alamat, email, plus 4 officials (KS, Bendahara, Pengawas, Sekdik) with NIP.

nodes.name: /data-guru (Data Guru)
nodes.description: Teacher and education staff data input page with Form/Upload tabs. Fields: nama guru, NIP, NUPTK, golongan, jabatan, mata pelajaran, status (PNS/CPNS/PPP/Honorer).

nodes.name: /bku (BKU)
nodes.description: BKU transaction table page with period filter, sort, auto-calculate saldo, print icon per row.

nodes.name: /bku/cetak/:id (Cetak Dokumen)
nodes.description: Dynamic route for document composition per BKU transaction. Split view with Card Grid, Document Editor, Document Preview, and footer actions.

nodes.name: /dokumen-wajib (Dokumen Wajib)
nodes.description: Mandatory documents page with SIPLAH toggle. Displays Dok. PBJ + conditional non-SIPLAH documents (Register KAS, Berita Acara, Lembar Kritik/Saran, Lembar Pengaduan, Papan BOS).

nodes.name: /realisasi (Realisasi Dana BOSP)
nodes.description: Realization page with 3 tabs: Cover, Sekat, Alur. Auto-calculate selisih, export per tab.

nodes.name: /pengaturan (Pengaturan)
nodes.description: Settings page with 4 tabs: Profil Sekolah, Data Master, Backup & Restore, Tentang.

nodes.name: LandingPage
nodes.description: Landing page components: LandingNavbar, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, InfoSection, Footer.

nodes.name: LoginPage
nodes.description: Login page components: LoginIllustration (animated SVG), LoginForm, AppInfo.

nodes.name: DashboardPage
nodes.description: Dashboard components: StatsCards, RecentBKUTable, DocumentProgress.

nodes.name: DataSekolahPage
nodes.description: School data page components: DataSekolahForm, DataSekolahUpload, TabSwitcher.

nodes.name: DataGuruPage
nodes.description: Teacher data page components: DataGuruForm, DataGuruUpload, DataGuruTable.

nodes.name: BKUPage
nodes.description: BKU table page components: BKUTable, BKUFilter, BKUActions, PrintButton.

nodes.name: CetakPage
nodes.description: Document composition page components: DocumentSidebar, DocumentCard, DocumentEditor, DocumentPreview, PreviewControls, PrintActions, BatchProcessor.

nodes.name: DokumenWajibPage
nodes.description: Mandatory documents page components: DokumenCard, UploadDokumen, SiplahToggle.

nodes.name: RealisasiPage
nodes.description: Realization page components: CoverForm, SekatTable, AlurFlow.

nodes.name: 17 BKU Utama Templates
nodes.description: 17 document templates for BKU transactions grouped into 7 gradient categories: Honor & Narasumber (blue), Perjalanan Dinas (emerald), Makan & Minum (orange), Dokumen Pendukung (purple), Workshop (pink), Sewa & Pemeliharaan (cyan), Tagihan (red). Each template has card with gradient header, icon, title, sub-type, and 4 action buttons (view, edit, print, download).

nodes.name: 6 Dokumen Wajib Templates
nodes.description: 6 mandatory document templates outside ARKAS: Dok. PBJ, Register KAS, Berita Acara Pemeriksaan KAS, Lembar Kritik/Saran, Lembar Pengaduan, Papan BOS. Card-based design with upload status indicators.

nodes.name: 3 Realisasi Templates
nodes.description: 3 realization document templates: Cover (tahun anggaran, nama sekolah, dana BOSP), Sekat (kode rekening, uraian, anggaran, realisasi), Alur (fund usage flow). Tab-based navigation.

nodes.name: State Management
nodes.description: React Context / Zustand for lightweight state management. State sections: documents (26 types with draft/published status), dokumenWajib (6 types with upload status), realisasi (cover/sekat/alur data), ui (sidebar, modal, toast, theme).

nodes.name: UI State Patterns
nodes.description: Reusable UI patterns: Empty State (icon + message + CTA), Loading State (spinner + skeleton), Error State (icon + message + retry), Confirmation Dialog (title + message + cancel/confirm), Toast Notification (success/error/info with auto-dismiss).

nodes.name: Card-Based Premium Design
nodes.description: Premium card design system with gradient headers, rounded-2xl shadow, hover effects (shadow-2xl, -translate-y-1), status indicators (green/yellow/red dots), action buttons (view, edit, print, download). 3 card variants: Type A (BKU edit+download), Type B (Dokumen Wajib upload), Type C (Realisasi tab-based).

nodes.name: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Sidebar with 8 menu items: Dashboard, Data Sekolah, Data Guru, BKU, Dokumen SPJ (Cetak), Dokumen Wajib, Realisasi, Pengaturan. Plus logo, school name, user info, and logout button.

nodes.name: 9+ Bukti Fisik Categories
nodes.description: Physical evidence categories: A. Honor (5 sub-types), B. Perjalanan Dinas (6 sub-types), C. Mamin (3 sub-types: rapat, kegiatan, tamu), D. Penggandaan, E. Cetak Foto, F. Cetak Banner, G. Sewa (3 sub-types), H. Pemeliharaan (3 sub-types), I. Tagihan (2 sub-types). Each requires specific supporting documents.
